task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Old_HQ' ground station has been removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Ground Stations configuration list or dialogs, 'Old_HQ' should no longer be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Iowa_Test_Farm' ground station with correct parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Ground Station configuration should show 'Iowa_Test_Farm' with Latitude 42.0308, Longitude -93.6319 (or 93.6319 W), Altitude 287, and Weather Station KAMW.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Nebraska_Site' ground station with correct parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Ground Station configuration should show 'Nebraska_Site' with Latitude 40.8258, Longitude -96.6817 (or 96.6817 W), Altitude 350, and Weather Station KLNK.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Iowa_Test_Farm' is set as the default ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GPredict Preferences window (Edit -> Preferences -> General -> Ground Stations), 'Iowa_Test_Farm' should be selected in the default ground station dropdown.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a tracking module named 'Drought_Monitor'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new module tab, window, or configuration dialog explicitly named 'Drought_Monitor' is visible in the GPredict interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required satellites are added to the 'Drought_Monitor' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Drought_Monitor' module's satellite list or configuration dialog shows NOAA 19, NOAA 20, SUOMI NPP, METOP-B, and METOP-C.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GPredict graphical user interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show GPredict application windows, menus, and dialog boxes being used, rather than a terminal window editing configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual GPredict software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard GPredict layout (maps, polar views, satellite lists) and is not a generic text editor or mock application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the answers into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Coordinates, ground station names, and satellite names are entered into the proper GPredict input fields, not written out in a text document or terminal echo command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Iowa_Test_Farm coordinates: 42.0308 N, 93.6319 W (or -93.6319), 287m altitude, KAMW weather station. Nebraska_Site coordinates: 40.8258 N, 96.6817 W (or -96.6817), 350m altitude, KLNK weather station. Obsolete ground station to remove: Old_HQ. Required satellites for Drought_Monitor: NOAA 19 (33591), NOAA 20 (43013), SUOMI NPP (37849), METOP-B (38771), METOP-C (43689).
